context: Tests whether the agent implements the review badge with correct schema.org structured data and server-rendering rationale, returns empty for zero reviews, builds stars correctly, and implements the stock indicator with the exact numeric thresholds from the skill.

checklist.name: Empty string for zero reviews
checklist.description: renderReviewBadge returns an empty string (or equivalent no-output) when reviewCount === 0

checklist.name: Stars with Math.round
checklist.description: The number of filled stars is determined by Math.round(avgRating), not Math.floor or Math.ceil

checklist.name: 5 star spans
checklist.description: The star display renders exactly 5 star elements (spans or equivalent), with filled vs empty distinction

checklist.name: schema.org AggregateRating itemscope
checklist.description: The review badge HTML includes itemscope and itemtype="https://schema.org/AggregateRating"

checklist.name: itemprop reviewCount
checklist.description: The review count element uses itemprop="reviewCount"

checklist.name: itemprop ratingValue
checklist.description: The average rating is marked up with itemprop="ratingValue" (via a meta tag or element attribute)

checklist.name: bestRating=5
checklist.description: itemprop="bestRating" with content="5" is included in the badge markup

checklist.name: Server-side rationale
checklist.description: widget-spec.md explains that the review badge should be server-rendered (not client-side only) for Google/search-engine indexing or rich snippet eligibility

checklist.name: Sold-out tier
checklist.description: renderStockIndicator returns an out-of-stock message when stockLevel === 0

checklist.name: Critical tier threshold ≤3
checklist.description: renderStockIndicator shows a 'only N left' or urgency message for stockLevel values 1, 2, and 3 (the critical tier cutoff is exactly 3)

checklist.name: Low tier threshold ≤10
checklist.description: renderStockIndicator shows a 'low stock' message for stockLevel values 4–10 (the low tier cutoff is exactly 10)

checklist.name: Empty above threshold
checklist.description: renderStockIndicator returns an empty string (or no output) when stockLevel > 10

checklist.name: Numeric interpolation only
checklist.description: The stock indicator HTML only interpolates the numeric stockLevel value — no user-input strings are interpolated into the markup

checklist.name: Visitor threshold noted
checklist.description: widget-spec.md or trust-widgets.ts references or documents that a visitor counter should only be displayed when the count exceeds a minimum threshold (e.g. 5)
